---
title: "Light in the Dark Places, or, Memorials of Christian life in the Middle Ages Translated from the German of the late Augustus Neander"
---

## Light in the Dark Places, or, Memorials of Christian life in the Middle Ages Translated from the German of the late Augustus Neander

**Author:** Johann August Wilhelm Neander
**Date:** 1850
**Imprint:** London: Sampson Low

### Notes

This was a translation of Neander\'s <i>Denkwürdigkeiten aus der Geschichte des christlichen Lebens</i> (1823-4)

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
